object_a.label: microwave
object_a.description: stainless steel built-in microwave mounted above oven
object_a.long_form_open_description: Stainless steel over-the-range style microwave mounted into the cabinetry above the stove. Reflective black/metal face with control panel on the right side (details small/unreadable).
